question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/util/DomainUtils.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: timeStampInNanos()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a transaction with a crafted TransactionValidStart whose seconds field is set to Long.MAX_VALUE (e.g., 9223372036854775807) so that Math.multiplyExact(timestamp.getSeconds(), NANOS_PER_SECOND) overflows, causing timeStampInNanos() to throw an uncaught ArithmeticException inside buildTransaction(), halting the importer pipeline and preventing all subsequent transactions from being confirmed?
